rawText:
English For Today 57
Handy Hints
1. Remember to wash and dry all vegetables before preparing them.
2. Be extra careful when handling sharp knife.
You may wish to choose a variety of fillings, For example, 4 slices of
cucumber, | slice of meat such as chicken loaf or meat loaf, mustard and
so on,

a sandwich.

5. Later, arrange one slice of and

top of another and serve.
B. Here is a recipe for making an omelette. Complete the
recipe by replacing the pictures with words from the box.
